subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! The Wronged One calleth thee from the precincts of the Prison and summoneth thee unto the supreme horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی مظلوم از شطر سجن ترا ندا مینماید و بافق اعلی دعوت
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
